mapper.sql: StockType, warehouse_code, ModelNo, CustomerNo, Property_ID, id, QtyBin, BinCell, CaseType, ProdType, createtime, updateTime, PositionNo, MeshType, InCaseQty, Adjustable, delFlag, LastdelFlag, BinType, safeQty, freq, mean, SetLevel, NewLevel, NewFreq, NewMean, SetFreq, po_type, SupplierCode, orderType, ProdSeri, StateRange, minPackageQty, DirectPurchase, AutoRepl, DirectDelivery, EPrice, ECode, ModelSeries, ppl, project_no, inventory_type_code, group_customer_no, origin, loginDate, ReplQty, ErrorModel, SetSupplierCode, ApplyQty
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.Bindata
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.Bindata (StockType, warehouse_code, ModelNo, CustomerNo, Property_ID, id, QtyBin, BinCell, CaseType, ProdType, createtime, updateTime, PositionNo, MeshType, InCaseQty, Adjustable, delFlag, LastdelFlag, BinType, safeQty, freq, mean, SetLevel, NewLevel, NewFreq, NewMean, SetFreq, po_type, SupplierCode, orderType, ProdSeri, StateRange, minPackageQty, DirectPurchase, AutoRepl, DirectDelivery, EPrice, ECode, ModelSeries, ppl, project_no, inventory_type_code, group_customer_no, origin, loginDate, ReplQty, ErrorModel, SetSupplierCode, ApplyQty) values (#{stocktype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{qtybin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{bincell,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{casetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prodtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{newmean,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{setfreq,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{poType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordertype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{prodseri,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{staterange,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{minpackageqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{directpurchase,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{autorepl,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{directdelivery,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelseries,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{origin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{replqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{errormodel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{setsuppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyqty,jdbcType=INTEGER})

mapper.update:
update dbo.Bindata
StockType = #{record.stocktype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Property_ID = #{record.propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
QtyBin = #{record.qtybin,jdbcType=INTEGER},
BinCell = #{record.bincell,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CaseType = #{record.casetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProdType = #{record.prodtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
createtime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
PositionNo = #{record.positionno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MeshType = #{record.meshtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InCaseQty = #{record.incaseqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Adjustable = #{record.adjustable,jdbcType=CHAR},
delFlag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
LastdelFlag = #{record.lastdelflag,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
BinType = #{record.bintype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
safeQty = #{record.safeqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
freq = #{record.freq,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mean = #{record.mean,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SetLevel = #{record.setlevel,jdbcType=CHAR},
NewLevel = #{record.newlevel,jdbcType=CHAR},
NewFreq = #{record.newfreq,jdbcType=INTEGER},
NewMean = #{record.newmean,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SetFreq = #{record.setfreq,jdbcType=INTEGER},
po_type = #{record.poType,jdbcType=CHAR},
SupplierCode = #{record.suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderType = #{record.ordertype,jdbcType=CHAR},
ProdSeri = #{record.prodseri,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
StateRange = #{record.staterange,jdbcType=CHAR},
minPackageQty = #{record.minpackageqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DirectPurchase = #{record.directpurchase,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
AutoRepl = #{record.autorepl,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
DirectDelivery = #{record.directdelivery,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
EPrice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ECode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelSeries = #{record.modelseries,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl = #{record.ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_no = #{record.projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{record.groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
origin = #{record.origin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
loginDate = #{record.logindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ReplQty = #{record.replqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ErrorModel = #{record.errormodel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SetSupplierCode = #{record.setsuppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApplyQty = #{record.applyqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.Bindata
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
QtyBin = #{qtybin,jdbcType=INTEGER},
BinCell = #{bincell,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CaseType = #{casetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProdType = #{prodtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
createtime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
PositionNo = #{positionno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MeshType = #{meshtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InCaseQty = #{incaseqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Adjustable = #{adjustable,jdbcType=CHAR},
delFlag = #{delflag,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
LastdelFlag = #{lastdelflag,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
BinType = #{bintype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
safeQty = #{safeqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
freq = #{freq,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mean = #{mean,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SetLevel = #{setlevel,jdbcType=CHAR},
NewLevel = #{newlevel,jdbcType=CHAR},
NewFreq = #{newfreq,jdbcType=INTEGER},
NewMean = #{newmean,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SetFreq = #{setfreq,jdbcType=INTEGER},
po_type = #{poType,jdbcType=CHAR},
SupplierCode = #{suppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderType = #{ordertype,jdbcType=CHAR},
ProdSeri = #{prodseri,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
StateRange = #{staterange,jdbcType=CHAR},
minPackageQty = #{minpackageqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DirectPurchase = #{directpurchase,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
AutoRepl = #{autorepl,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
DirectDelivery = #{directdelivery,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
EPrice = #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ECode = #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelSeries = #{modelseries,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl = #{ppl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_no = #{projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_type_code = #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
group_customer_no = #{groupCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
origin = #{origin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
loginDate = #{logindate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ReplQty = #{replqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ErrorModel = #{errormodel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SetSupplierCode = #{setsuppliercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ApplyQty = #{applyqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where StockType = #{stocktype,jdbcType=INTEGER} and warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and Property_ID = #{propertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
